1.0.0.summary: The first public release of TokenMaxxer.
notes: Track usage across Codex, Antigravity, DeepSeek, and Z.ai accounts in one place
See remaining quota, reset windows, and account balances at a glance
View estimated spend and token history per account
Drill into any account for model-level breakdowns
Credentials stay in your operating system's secure storage — nothing leaves your device
Signed downloads for Windows, macOS, and Linux
